data.content:
1. [src/app/query.rs:58] and [src/app/query.rs:161] add new DB-backed lease-agent enrichment in `show_knot`, but the added tests only build `KnotView` fixtures directly in [src/ui/tests.rs:303] and do not assert the lookup behavior from a bound lease record.
2. [src/run_commands.rs:30] adds a new rejection path for `kno show <lease-id>`, but there is no automated regression test covering that command behavior or its JSON variant. This repo’s guardrails require tests for each new behavior.
Manual verification in a disposable repo succeeded, and `make sanity` passed at 95.17% coverage.
